name: Ianthia Fisher
bio: Ianthia Fisher serves as the Mayor of Crockett, the county seat of Houston County, the oldest county in Texas. Named for Davy Crockett who camped near the site, the city has deep historical roots. The mayor presides over city council meetings and works to improve city services and economic opportunity.
campaignPromises: Preserve Crockett's historical heritage and promote tourism
Improve city infrastructure and water systems
Support economic development and job creation
Enhance community programs and quality of life
